About.description: Software Engineer with experience in building REST APIs and backend services in enterprise environments. I work on the design and development of backend services, including API development, system integration, and performance improvements in production environments. In my day-to-day work, I develop REST APIs using Java, working with relational databases, and implementing business logic in scalable backend systems. I have also worked in cloud environments, deploying solutions adapted to real project needs. I have experience with Spring Boot and microservices-based architectures, focusing on building maintainable and efficient systems. Currently focused on growing as a backend Java developer in projects involving Spring Boot and microservices.

resp1.text: Development and implementation of REST APIs in enterprise environments using Java

resp2.text: Backend business logic development and integration with internal and external systems

resp3.text: Contribution to backend service scalability and performance improvements in production environments

resp4.text: Participation in system evolution and migrations, ensuring service continuity

resp5.text: Performance optimization and incident resolution in production environments

resp6.text: Data management and integration with relational databases

resp7.text: Collaboration in agile teams, participating in code reviews and continuous improvement

resp8.text: Integration of enterprise platforms (Liferay) within backend architectures

resp1.text: Backend service development using Java and Spring Boot following clean architecture principles

resp2.text: Design and implementation of REST APIs documented with Swagger/OpenAPI

resp4.text: Development of unit and integration tests to ensure code quality

resp5.text: Application monitoring using Prometheus and Grafana for performance analysis

resp6.text: Participation in microservices-based architectures and service-to-service communication

detail2.text: Completed the degree in 4 years, passing all subjects on the first attempt (with 3 academic honors, 11 outstanding, and 18 notable)
